name: session-reporter
description: Open remote SSH folders in a new VS Code window and automatically sync your active VS Code sessions to any backend dashboard.

sessionReporter.backendUrl.markdownDescription: URL of your dashboard backend, e.g. `https://dashboard.example.com`

sessionReporter.agentToken.markdownDescription: Secret token matching the `AGENT_TOKEN` environment variable on the backend

sessionReporter.hostAlias.markdownDescription: Identifier for this host (e.g. SSH config alias). Defaults to the system hostname.

sessionReporter.sshUser.markdownDescription: SSH user used to connect to this host (e.g. `root`). Used to generate the correct `user@host` VS Code workspace URI so Copilot Chat history is preserved.

sessionReporter.reportInterval.markdownDescription: How often (in seconds) to send a workspace heartbeat to the backend (default: 60)
